历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest science rankings were approximately 2857 → 9006 → 7364 → 6134 → 535. In 2025, due to the subdivision of major groups (Physics Category divided into groups 101/102), the ranking significantly advanced to 535, showing an overall forward trend in recent two years. The provincial science enrollment plan: 57 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 60 in 2023, 53 in 2024, and 11 in 2025 (Physics Category). In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 17, an increase of about 54.5% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking range of 11–16 in recent years, belonging to the top engineering powerhouses nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 10th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting high application attention. It has 17 A- or above disciplines, including Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, and Mechanics as A+, Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering as A, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Class, Academician Special Class, Top Class, etc.) belongs to high-heat major directions. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi Province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang, which is a cross-province application.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 535, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 54.5% easing competition, the increase of Shaanxi Physics Category examinees by about 19.7% intensifying competition, and the high Douyin popularity attracting more high-scoring students, the 2026 lowest ranking is expected to slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted lowest ranking is about 700, with a range of 620–780.

If your ranking is close to the upper bound of the range, you can focus on Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts were approximately 990 → 999 → 1175 → 812 → 847, with recent fluctuations between 800–1200 and a 2025 baseline of about 847; provincial liberal arts enrollment plans: 7 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 15 in 2024, 15 in 2025 (History Category); the 2026 History Category plan is 8, a reduction of about 46.7% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 12th nationally in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top-tier universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed; ranked 10th in Douyin comprehensive popularity (high heat), with high application attention; Management Science and Engineering rated A+, Business Administration rated A, highly relevant to the liberal arts enrollment major (Economics and Management Experimental Class).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Economics and Management Experimental Class (including Business Administration, Accounting, Architecture, etc.) has stable social popularity; the number of History Category examinees in Shaanxi in 2026 is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% from 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang, representing cross-province application.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 847, the approximately 46.7% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, the approximately 17% increase in Shaanxi History Category examinees further intensifying competition, and the high Douyin popularity attracting more applicants, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift significantly forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 595, with a range of 527–663.
